command: cd "C:/Users/Cameron/Projects/peon-ping" && mkdir -p .gitban/agents/reviewer/logs && ts=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") && logfile=".gitban/agents/reviewer/logs/SMARTPACKDEBT-exg19y-reviewer-1.jsonl" && echo "{\"timestamp\":\"${ts}\",\"operation\":\"init\",\"role\":\"reviewer\",\"sprint\":\"SMARTPACKDEBT\",\"card_id\":\"exg19y\",\"cycle\":1}" > "$logfile" && echo "{\"timestamp\":\"${ts}\",\"operation\":\"event\",\"label\":\"read-diff\",\"metadata\":{\"commit\":\"4126d41152221fd6db1a3fadb6fbf2e4b2c99024\"}}" >> "$logfile" && echo "{\"timestamp\":\"${ts}\",\"operation\":\"event\",\"label\":\"read-card\",\"metadata\":{\"card_id\":\"exg19y\"}}" >> "$logfile" && echo "{\"timestamp\":\"${ts}\",\"operation\":\"event\",\"label\":\"write-review\",\"metadata\":{\"verdict\":\"APPROVAL\"}}" >> "$logfile" && echo "{\"timestamp\":\"${ts}\",\"operation\":\"event\",\"label\":\"card-status-change\",\"metadata\":{\"new_status\":\"in_progress\"}}" >> "$logfile" && echo "{\"timestamp\":\"${ts}\",\"operation\":\"summary\",\"total_commands\":0,\"failed_commands\":0,\"total_duration_s\":0}" >> "$logfile"
